title: PUBG MOBILE
notes:
The first ancient Greek myth-themed version, Hero's Crown is here! Conquer the four temple areas, complete five glorious trials, and recruit the centaur ally to fight alongside you!

Battle Royale
1. New Themed Mode: Four Mysterious Areas × Five New Trials → Challenge and recruit the centaur ally, and conquer the Crown's Abode.
2. Returning Themed Mode: Dinoground is back after three years!
3. Classic Mode: The 2-seater convertible Roadster is here with turbocharged speed.
New Collaborations

notes:

[New Character - Ray] Link to a target and knock them down when they're low on HP. A takedown resets the skill.

title: MadOut 2: Grand Racing games
notes:
- "Car Theft" Event: A new, risky opportunity to earn money has appeared in the city. During the event, find suitable cars, steal them, and deliver them to the drop-off points before you're stopped. The cleaner your job, the higher the reward.
- "Lost Cargo" Event: Planes periodically fly over the city, dropping valuable cargo containers. Get to the drop-off point, open the container, collect the loot, and deliver it to the drop-off point. But be prepared: such cargo can be quite a hunt.
- Angel
